Fast browser replay. Slider moves through stored best solutions per generation. Pipes are colored by diameter. Junction colors show elevation only: green = lower elevation, red = higher elevation, gray = missing elevation.
Gen 0
1.00 gen/s
- train_fit
- paper_score
- best delta vs ref
- feasible
Run Info
Pipe diametergreen = small, red = large
smalllarge
Node elevationgreen = low, red = high
lowhigh
Gray nodes mean no elevation value was available. Reservoirs are drawn larger than junctions.
Controls: slider, arrow keys, and playback buttons.
